title: UK REACH authorisation for SEA (Sanitaryware Consortium), 20 January 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised use  The use of chromium trioxide for the electroplating of sanitaryware and plumbing components, to create a coating to provide specific performance characteristics.  Holders of the authorisation and authorisation numbers  Surface Engineering Association, Sanitaryware Consortium:   Broadway Brass Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/00) Crown Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/01) Douglas Metal Finishing Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/02) John Stokes Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/03) Midland Polishing & Plating (UKREACH/25/02/04) Star Polishing & Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/05) The Sterlingham Co Ltd (UKREACH/25/02/06)   Date of decision  20 January 2025 "
